1.judgement: Pure creative force (Qian doubled): innate vitality before it is shaped by events. Inner alchemy reads this as true yang in its fountainhead—preserve depth and timing rather than forcing display.
1.image: Heaven moving over heaven: strength that renews itself in cycles. Let movement stay aligned with what is natural; restlessness spends the root.

lines.1: Power is still concealed like a dragon in the deep; gather virtue in obscurity instead of advertising it.
lines.2: The dragon appears in the field; influence widens when substance is ready to be seen without exaggeration.
lines.3: Vigilance through a trying stretch; danger comes from overstepping before integration—stay earnest from dawn to dusk.
lines.4: Leaping in the abyss: testing the waters without commitment to presumption; no mistake if you remain honest about limits.
lines.5: The dragon flies; meeting the great person symbolizes correspondence between inner worth and fitting position.
lines.6: Arrogant dragon: yang pushed past measure; regret follows when height forgets return and humility.

2.judgement: The receptive (Kun doubled): breadth and bearing of the earth. Taoist practice emphasizes yielding that carries weight—following the thread of the moment without losing your center.
2.image: Earth supporting earth: devotion that thickens through stillness. Nourish others by steady presence, not by grasping the lead.

lines.1: Hoarfrost underfoot: small signs foreshadow firm outcomes; watch the first thin edges of a pattern.
lines.2: Straight, square, great: natural virtue needs no force to align events; sincerity arranges the field.
lines.3: Hold excellence in reserve in service to the whole; accomplish without private claim to glory.
lines.4: The sack closed: contain expression until the time is true; neither praise nor blame is sought.
lines.5: Yellow lower garment: modest dignity in the place of honor; earth-colors mark centered good fortune.
lines.6: Dragons fight in the wild: poles contend when yielding forgets its measure; step back from wasteful clash.

3.judgement: Difficulty at the beginning: chaos before pattern. Seed-energies tangle at the outset; establish small reliable orders instead of grand strokes.
3.image: Thunder in clouds—awakening under pressure. Clarify roles and simplify beginnings; confusion lifts through patient sorting.

lines.1: Hesitate at the hedge; small obstacles teach you where not to charge.
lines.2: Lost horses return: setbacks self-correct when you refrain from anxious chasing.
lines.3: Hunt without a guide in the forest; rash entry invites entanglement—seek counsel.
lines.4: Advance slowly like a cart with brakes; restraint in difficulty preserves the enterprise.
lines.5: Small perseverance in difficulty: modest offerings are enough when sincerity is real.
lines.6: Blood and tears flow when excess meets obstruction; accept limits and withdraw from futile struggle.

4.judgement: Youthful folly: innocence that must be schooled. The Taoist reading favors opening to instruction rather than clever self-will.
4.image: Spring at the mountain’s foot: nourish the inner spring through disciplined learning, not scattered curiosity.

lines.1: Folly: discipline the urge to improvise without roots.
lines.2: Embrace the good wife model: receive teaching that softens rigidity.
lines.3: Do not take a girl who flaunts ornaments—attachments to image mislead growth.
lines.4: Entangled folly: loosen identification with appearances.
lines.5: Immature folly is gentle and corrigible if met with patience.
lines.6: Strike folly, not out of cruelty but to prevent harm; boundaries guard the young work.

5.judgement: Waiting: nourishment gathered before action. Inner readiness trusts the right season rather than forcing gates open.
5.image: Clouds above heaven: drink and eat in patience—joy is part of preparation, not escape.

lines.1: Wait at the outskirts: hold the periphery without complaint while conditions ripen.
lines.2: Wait on the sand: minor irritations test equanimity; whispers finally fade.
lines.3: Wait in the mud: involvement mires you when you plunge too soon.
lines.4: Wait in blood: out of the pit, emerge sobered and quiet.
lines.5: Wait at the feast: sincerity draws favorable convergence.
lines.6: Fall into the pit: three uninvited guests arrive—accept what comes with humble hospitality.

6.judgement: Conflict: heaven and water diverge. Taoist counsel favors suspending litigation in the heart before insisting on outer victory.
6.image: Mind and circumstance pull apart; revisit the beginning motive before entrenching opposition.

lines.1: Do not perpetuate small quarrels; let the matter dissolve at its root.
lines.2: Retreat from conflict; the central way avoids the corrupt middleman.
lines.3: Feed on old virtue: sustain yourself from past merit while avoiding new entanglements.
lines.4: Conflict turns back because fate does not sustain the quarrel; return to essence.
lines.5: Sincere contention before the sage: truth spoken cleanly finds hearing.
lines.6: Leather strap awarded then stripped three times: unstable honors teach humility.

7.judgement: The army: discipline and common purpose. Righteous leadership gathers people without bullying.
7.image: Water in earth: store strength in the populace; rule by humanity, not by fear alone.

lines.1: An army must march from agreed order; chaos at the start undermines all.
lines.2: Camp in the center: balance between advance and rest.
lines.3: Corpse in the wagon: ill omens when leadership is misplaced—correct ranks.
lines.4: Camp on the left: unconventional positioning for surprise and adaptation.
lines.5: Young game in the field: measured gain without predatory greed.
lines.6: Great elder establishes heads: many leaders unified by one humane standard.

8.judgement: Holding together: alliance around sincerity. The Taoist lens stresses natural attraction, not forced loyalty oaths.
8.image: Water on earth: channel affinity toward common benefit; widen the circle without diluting the center.

lines.1: Hold without fullness; simple good faith suffices at the start.
lines.2: Hold inwardly: core sincerity silently draws support.
lines.3: You hold to the wrong cluster; examine companions.
lines.4: Hold outwardly with correct aspiration; following the great person steadies outcome.
lines.5: Manifest holding together: the king hunts on three sides, sparing the driven game—mercy in union.
lines.6: Holding without a head: union needs a clear humane focus or it disperses.

9.judgement: Small taming: slight restraint refines excess. Minor adjustments redirect great energy.
9.image: Wind across heaven: polish outer deportment gently; small habits shape the abyss of character.

lines.1: Return to your path; small detours self-correct through humility.
lines.2: Led back by affinity; devotion pulls you to center.
lines.3: The wagon drags; inner friction warns against rushed coupling of opposites.
lines.4: Blood ceases and fear leaves: honesty about limits dissolves phantom dread.
lines.5: Sincere bonds in neighborliness: small circles yield trustworthy allies.
lines.6: It has rained and rests: excess has cleared; virtue now appears without strain.

10.judgement: Treading: measured steps on dangerous ground. Conscious courtesy crosses where bluntness would slip.
10.image: Lake below heaven: distinguish high and low within yourself; refine conduct before teaching outwardly.

lines.1: Plain treading: simple sincerity proceeds without ornament.
lines.2: Treading a smooth, level road; the recluse’s constancy prospers.
lines.3: A one-eyed man still sees; a lame man still treads—use what you have without pretense.
lines.4: Treading on the tiger’s tail with utmost caution; nearing completion, fear becomes care.
lines.5: Resolute treading: peril remains, but correctness keeps you clean.
lines.6: Inspect the augury: long practice reveals whether the track holds.

11.judgement: Peace: small departs, great approaches. Taoist reading: yin and yang in generous exchange—open the chest to inflow.
11.image: Heaven descends, earth ascends: marry above and below within; then the family of phenomena thrives.

lines.1: Pull grass with unity; inclusion strengthens the root.
lines.2: Bear with the uncultured; forbearance in peace prevents Rot.
lines.3: The embankment empties the willow course; unchecked ease erodes structure guard modest prosperity.
lines.4: Fluttering brilliance: humility in abundance lets light stay usable.
lines.5: The king gives his daughter; mutual blessing dignifies exchange.
lines.6: The wall falls back into the moat: overconfidence topples what peace built—mend boundaries gently.

12.judgement: Standstill: great departs, small approaches. Withdrawal to inner worth preserves the spark when outer harmony fails.
12.image: Heaven and earth do not touch: do not force fusion; refine what is yours in silence.

lines.1: Pull grass with unity even in obstruction: small sincerity binds.
lines.2: Bear and endure: officials find food for the king through dark times—serve the invisible.
lines.3: Embarrassment: pulling up the bulrushes linked to their roots—rash moves entangle.
lines.4: Ordained mandate, no blame: stillness aligned with heaven’s timing.
lines.5: Standstill ends; the great person’s joy revives like binding mulberry shoots.
lines.6: Standstill overturns: first closure, later opening—turn the knot with patience.

13.judgement: Fellowship in the open: fellowship under heaven, candid and equal. Sincerity in daylight outwits clever schemes.
13.image: Fire with heaven: organize diversity without smothering difference; clarify roles in shared warmth.

lines.1: Fellowship at the gate: sincerity at the threshold gathers allies.
lines.2: Fellowship in the clan: partiality narrows; widen the circle.
lines.3: Hide warriors in the thicket, climbing the high mound: suspicion dissolves fellowship—drop covertness.
lines.4: Fellowship on the heights: success after overcoming isolation.
lines.5: Fellowship with the great assembly; the elder’s sincerity binds many hearts.
lines.6: Fellowship in the suburbs: ultimate inclusiveness leaves nothing outside—completion.

14.judgement: Great possession: wealth of virtue and resource. Hold greatness without possessiveness.
14.image: Fire in heaven: restrain shadows and encourage the good; align with heaven’s impartial favor.

lines.1: No association with what harms; early distance from toxicity protects abundance.
lines.2: Great wagon to load: capacity expanded through trustworthy helpers.
lines.3: What the small man can do, a great man completes without insulting the small.
lines.4: Not self-assertion alone but reverence for what is greater keeps possession whole.
lines.5: Sincere interchange with heaven’s mandate: blessings become mutual.
lines.6: Heaven helps; gates open when self-interest yields to the pattern.

15.judgement: Modesty: the mountain hides within earth. True height lowers itself; accomplishment travels farther.
15.image: Reduce excess and lift shortage: humility redistributes heaven’s gifts.

lines.1: The modest go deep; in the end, a noble calling.
lines.2: Modesty expressed outwardly: persistence brings good outcome.
lines.3: The meritorious yet humble: the great person completes without boasting.
lines.4: Nothing that does not further modesty: every movement harmonizes.
lines.5: Poor neighbor invades—modesty attracts help without shame.
lines.6: Modesty proclaimed: genuine lowliness needs no trumpet; let deeds speak.

16.judgement: Enthusiasm: thunder from earth stirs joy. Righteous music orders the energy of the people.
16.image: Align celebration with merit; avoid dissipation disguised as delight.

lines.1: Boasting of enthusiasm invites obstacles; keep joy grounded.
lines.2: Firm as stone between stones: concentration steadies ecstatic impulse.
lines.3: Regret in enthusiasm: looking up, looking down—lost center until you return.
lines.4: Great acquisition from enthusiasm when hearts share a sincere source.
lines.5: Sickness in persistence on death: rigid fixation warps joy—soften.
lines.6: Blind enthusiasm ends; dark change teaches sobriety.

17.judgement: Following: adapt without losing backbone. Taoist reading: follow the way like water follows contours.
17.image: Thunder in the lake late in the day: rest after exertion; follow natural rhythm.

lines.1: Change of purpose brings good fortune; flexible mind finds the path.
lines.2: Following the young leads to losing the mature: know whom you shadow.
lines.3: Following something gained by losing something—evaluate the trade.
lines.4: Following with gain; sincerity converts difficulty into alliance.
lines.5: Sincere in the great: devotion to what is truly great secures following.
lines.6: Bound with cords, followed into the grove: capture misleads if you chase too far—release attachment.

18.judgement: Work on what has been spoiled: repair ancestral patterns. Courage faces rot without disgust.
18.image: Wind on the mountain: stir the people’s spirit and mend neglect before it deepens.

lines.1: Rectify the father’s vice before small error grows.
lines.2: Rectify the mother’s excess with gentleness—soft influence heals.
lines.3: Rectify the father’s failure: some regret, no great blame.
lines.4: Excuse the father’s shortcomings by surpassing them in virtue.
lines.5: Rectify the father’s work with praise—good fortune rises for posterity.
lines.6: Do not serve kings or princes—elevate a higher standard in seclusion when rank corrupts.

19.judgement: Approach: power of growth descends generously. Teach and protect without overwhelming.
19.image: Lake over earth: inexhaustible will to teach; patience widens like marshes.

lines.1: Confidence at approach; perseverance furthers like gathered virtue.
lines.2: Good fortune at approach without haste—sincerity in the center.
lines.3: Contented approach: little to regret if desire stays clean.
lines.4: Complete approach without fault—readiness from inner fullness.
lines.5: Wise approach with the great person’s sincerity—auspicious undertaking.
lines.6: Sincere, rich approach; blameless even toward the changing month.

20.judgement: Contemplation: washing without offering yet—sincerity looks up to the model above.
20.image: Wind over earth: the ancient kings toured regions to behold the people’s truth.

lines.1: Childlike contemplation: simple gaze for those of common mind.
lines.2: Peek through the blind: narrow vision in a favorable woman’s fidelity—expand gently.
lines.3: Contemplate my life’s turning points; advance or retreat with self-honesty.
lines.4: Contemplate the nation’s light; guest-like humility draws teaching.
lines.5: Contemplate my life: the great person is without blame.
lines.6: Contemplate my place; the great person is without fault—overview clarifies duty.

21.judgement: Biting through: justice clarifies obstruction. Thunder and lightning cut through denial.
21.image: Define penalties clearly yet humanely; clarity without cruelty.

lines.1: Stock on feet: stop the smallest misconduct before it runs.
lines.2: Bite skin on nose: shame corrects superficial fault.
lines.3: Bite dried meat, find poison: old grievances need careful sorting.
lines.4: Bite gold bone: firm justice penetrates hardened habit.
lines.5: Bite gold meat: yellow ears symbolize centered hearing—justice listens.
lines.6: Shoulder carrying cangue: harshness that deafens the ears mis-serves law—soften severity.

22.judgement: Grace: adornment furthers small matters. Beauty serves the essence, not the mask.
22.image: Fire at mountain’s foot: polish affairs without confusing surface for core.

lines.1: Walk with grace at foot of hill: set aside carriage for humble carriage of detail.
lines.2: Grace in beard: outward polish rests on inner firmness.
lines.3: Moist grace reaches culmination; lastingness prefers simplicity.
lines.4: Grace like a white horse: sincerity outshines dyes.
lines.5: Garden rolls in the hill: modest beauty in high place gains a lean mate—true match.
lines.6: Grainless grace: strip decoration when it distracts from truth.

23.judgement: Splitting apart: the mountain rests on earth. Those above endure by enriching those below.
23.image: Generosity downward anchors throne; extractive height hollows the base.

lines.1: Peeling the bed’s legs undermines rest: fix foundations early.
lines.2: Peeling the bed’s frame: affections and structure weaken together—support both.
lines.3: Peeling without fault when you divide the blame honestly.
lines.4: Peeling the bed’s skin approaches you—surface ills touch the person directly.
lines.5: Fish with lead disks: string the households through sincerity against decline.
lines.6: Fruit still uncarried: the nobles receive a cart—final peeling reverses when virtue returns.

24.judgement: Return: the turning point within earth. One yang line returns; seize a small practice and repeat it.
24.image: Thunder in earth: close passes at solstice; gather inward before expanding.

lines.1: Return after a short trip; remorse disappears when error is quickly corrected.
lines.2: Good fortune in return—quiet joy in finding the root.
lines.3: Repeated return; danger without fault if you stay earnest.
lines.4: Return alone in the center: choosing path inwardly between alternatives.
lines.5: Generous return without self-congratulation—noble humility.
lines.6: Miss the return: misfortune stalks when the hinge moment is ignored—years of regret.

25.judgement: Innocent truth: thunder under heaven—spontaneous correctness. What is not as it should be brings misfortune.
25.image: Act from untainted impulse yet examine the seed of intent; nurture beings without calculation.

lines.1: Innocent advance brings good fortune when aim stays simple.
lines.2: Reap without plowing new fields—accept what innocence gathers without greedy extension.
lines.3: Undeserved mishap: the steer’s rope lost—sometimes heaven tests sincerity.
lines.4: Hold fast; innocence can stand firm through false accusation.
lines.5: Sickness of innocence: test medicine on yourself before prescribing.
lines.6: Brutal innocence meets misfortune when naive force overrides discernment.

26.judgement: Great storing: heaven in the mountain—accumulate character and patterns. Rely on study, not impulse.
26.image: The great person imitates many ancient words and deeds to thicken the storehouse.

lines.1: Danger halts; self-cultivation profits from pausing peril.
lines.2: The axles detach from the cart—the team halts; companions separate until virtue reunites.
lines.3: Fine stallion chase; youth’s hardship toward the hard work—persevere.
lines.4: Young bull’s horn-guard: prevent harm before horns grow.
lines.5: Tusk of gelded boar: fierceness transformed into harmless strength.
lines.6: Heaven’s thoroughfare: success when taming power reaches summation.

27.judgement: Nourishment: source and intake of life. Watch words and food as gates of qi.
27.image: Thunder at mountain’s foot: temper expression and appetite toward long life.

lines.1: Abandon sacred tortoise for my watching: envy drains inner wealth—return to self-nourishment.
lines.2: Deviate downward; neglect the wise feeding—correct the jaw’s direction.
lines.3: Feed on the hillside; persist on what is right despite inconvenience.
lines.4: Feed on brilliance lurking danger—ambition’s feast can poison.
lines.5: Feed from obliquity: stay centered even if the path angles.
lines.6: Source of nourishment: danger when gain ignores merit—rethink priorities.

28.judgement: Preponderance of the great: ridgepole sags. Excess weight demands relief valves and new bearing points.
28.image: Lake submerges trees: stand alone without self-pity; renounce if carrying the world breaks you.

lines.1: White rafter paste: patch the overload with clean, modest repair.
lines.2: Dry poplar sprouts at root: life returns in hidden places.
lines.3: Ridgepole bent upward: shame when pride bends structure.
lines.4: Ridgepole uplifted—auspicious if followed; stillness here can help.
lines.5: Withered flowers on elders: temporary honor atop weakness needs strengthening within.
lines.6: Fording brings overflow; blameless only if intention stays humane despite flood.

29.judgement: The Abysmal repeated: sincerity in the heart makes deeds succeed through water’s persistence.
29.image: Water flows without losing direction—practice potency in teaching and virtue.

lines.1: Repeat abysses, find import in petty matters—small sincerity counts.
lines.2: Abyss with dangerous defiles; seek only small progress.
lines.3: Come and go in abyss: peril yet no great fault if you keep heart.
lines.4: Jug of wine, ceremonial vessels; open simplicity in danger builds trust.
lines.5: Abyss not filling to overflow—controlled depth.
lines.6: Bound with ropes in a pit: too long in peril without adaptation invites disaster—move intelligently.

30.judgement: The Clinging: clarity doubled. Brightness repeated—let light cling to what is worth illuminating.
30.image: Brightness to the four quarters: sustain clarity without burning out.

lines.1: Footsteps confused at first; attentive care avoids blame.
lines.2: Yellow clarity: centered illumination in the woman’s fidelity—good fortune.
lines.3: Sun at midday sees only gasps: glitter blinding itself—modulate intensity.
lines.4: Suddenness like bursting, dying, abandoning—flash events; throw off lifelessness quickly.
lines.5: Sobbing tears; floods of good fortune in release.
lines.6: War leader punishing: harsh brilliance must eventually yield to justice tempered with mercy.

31.judgement: Influence: lake on mountain—attraction that opens. Steady receptivity invites union without haste.
31.image: The superior man welcomes others by being approachable yet principled.

lines.1: Influence in the big toe: first stirrings of desire toward contact.
lines.2: Influence in the calves; bad if impatient—wait for harmony.
lines.3: Influence in the thighs: stubborn holding on the thigh obstructs free following.
lines.4: Correctness in influence brings good fortune; regrets vanish; friends follow in thought.
lines.5: Influence in the back of neck—words held in silence move hearts.
lines.6: Influence in jaw and tongue—the danger of persuasive chatter replacing sincerity.

32.judgement: Duration: thunder and wind married in lasting motion. Constancy is flexible direction, not fixation.
32.image: Stand firm without wobbling purpose even as forms change.

lines.1: Seek duration too vehemently; breadth requires some give.
lines.2: Duration lost through personal insistence—a woman’s strength endures by adaptability.
lines.3: Whoever lacks duration in character meets disgrace; chop wood yet seek deeper merit.
lines.4: Hunt in no field: misplaced persistence yields nothing.
lines.5: Duration in the woman’s fidelity; good for the man if roles harmonize.
lines.6: Constant shaking: agitation mistaken for endurance drains spirit.

33.judgement: Retreat: mountain under heaven—yielding before overpowering weight. Strategic withdrawal preserves power.
33.image: Keep inferiors at distance calmly, without resentment’s heat.

lines.1: Retreat the tail; danger halts if you do not drag what should be left.
lines.2: Yellow ox-hide strap—firm gentleness binds the retreat to discipline.
lines.3: Laden retreat with servants’ illness: burdens slow disengagement—lighten.
lines.4: Friendly retreat: right persons part without cutting connection.
lines.5: Friendly retreat—great person’s fortune.
lines.6: Rich retreat—nothing refuses you when leaving cleanses thoroughly.

34.judgement: Great power: thunder in heaven—vigor must obey pattern. Step only where alignment allows.
34.image: Do not tread paths that break cosmic order; discipline strength with measure.

lines.1: Power at the feet: forestall mischief at the first thunder.
lines.2: Righteous persistence; carriage swamped still centered.
lines.3: The inferior uses power for a fence; the superior hesitates—choose wisely.
lines.4: Gate-beam bends—power meets check; stop to reassess.
lines.5: Loseth the sheep in ease: small loss teaches big caution.
lines.6: Ram butts the hedge, horns stuck—forward force entangled; desist.

35.judgement: Progress: sun over earth—the powerful win honorable notice. Brighten inner virtue to match ascent.
35.image: Clarify character as the sun clarifies the field.

lines.1: Advance with confidence; sincerity rewarded at the start.
lines.2: Advancing while worried—inherited mother’s blessing strengthens.
lines.3: All approve—release petty envy to receive communal trust.
lines.4: Advancing like wood rat: stealthy yet effective effort.
lines.5: Regret vanishes; regard gain or loss without fixation—central advance.
lines.6: Advance horns; danger only if you conquer the city—know when to push and when justice forbids.

36.judgement: Darkening of the light: brightness wounded—persist through concealment. Taoist practice adapts in eclipse without losing the inner flame.
36.image: Live with the great dark: veil outer brilliance to protect seed-light.

lines.1: Fly with wings lowered: hide capability at journey’s outset.
lines.2: Darkening in the left thigh; strong horse still saves—lean on resilience.
lines.3: Hunt in the south, capture chief—active patience in obscurity.
lines.4: Enter the left belly, gain heart of darkening—inner counsel in trouble.
lines.5: Darkness like prince of woes; avoid fixation on comparing wounds.
lines.6: Not light but dark; first ascend into heaven, later enter earth—full cycle of hidden phases.

37.judgement: The family: wind from fire—inner order radiates. Substance in words, duration in conduct.
37.image: Let roles within the heart’s household align; then society mirrors harmony.

lines.1: Guard the home with prevention—fences for early discipline.
lines.2: Woman’s inner devotion—the kitchen’s constancy feeds the whole.
lines.3: Family members sneer—discipline through earnest warnings.
lines.4: Enrich the home through gentle leadership.
lines.5: King’s influence on the household—mercy with law.
lines.6: Truthfulness at last—wonderworking when hearts finally align.

38.judgement: Opposition: fire above lake—diversity without forced unity. Seek harmony in the way of life, not sameness.

lines.1: Regret disappears; lost horse returns—trust reconciliation.
lines.2: Meet the great person in opposition—avoid the child’s narrow ally.
lines.3: Cart dragged, ox halted—stuck between factions; begin anew without bitterness.
lines.4: Isolated opposition meets alliance with sincere counterpart.
lines.5: Regret vanishes with great companions; bite through skin—truth pierces surface.
lines.6: Isolated sincerity; seeing pigs covered with mud—the heart suspends judgement until truth appears.

39.judgement: Obstruction: water on mountain—halt clarifies character. Southwest favors yielding approach; seek wise counsel.
39.image: Turn attention inward; mold character when path is blocked.

lines.1: Past obstruction; praise the great person’s perseverance.
lines.2: Courtier’s obstruction—loyal service through crux.
lines.3: Obstruction encircles returning—reflect before another round.
lines.4: Obstruction joins to fate—accept limitation as teacher.
lines.5: Great obstructions, great companions arrive—shared burden lifts.
lines.6: Obstruction passes; great person arrives—blockage becomes gateway.

40.judgement: Deliverance: thunder and rain ease tension. Forgiveness unties knots.
40.image: Pardon faults when remorse is real; justice tempered releases qi.

lines.1: No blame at the boundary of deliverance.
lines.2: Capture three foxes in the field; obtain a yellow arrow—skill removes sly hindrances.
lines.3: Carrying burden on pack yet riding vehicle—mixed signals invite robbers—simplify.
lines.4: Release big toe’s bonds—first mobility returns.
lines.5: The great person’s deliverance; rats vanish with sincere mark.
lines.6: The prince shoots the hawk on the high wall—remove predatory pride.

41.judgement: Decrease: mountain over lake—trim excess to feed need. Sincere decrease brings supreme success.
41.image: Restrain anger and appetites; decrease self to increase the whole.

lines.1: Leaving quickly on affairs; blameless frugality.
lines.2: Ten arms of offering—shared sacrifice in decrease deepens sincerity.
lines.3: Three companions journey; one is lost—fine-tune companions in lean times.
lines.4: Decrease ills quickly; mixed joy cautions celebration.
lines.5: Increase given in decrease—paired generosity lifts all.
lines.6: Increase without theft—others freely add when you stop hoarding.

42.judgement: Increase: wind and thunder—undertake and cross great water. Imitate good, shed faults.
42.image: Wind encourages thunder; imitation of excellence amplifies growth.

lines.1: Great increase aids when duty calls—share windfall.
lines.2: Ten pairs of tortoise shells concur—unanimous sign for increase.
lines.3: Increase through calamity—gain character from trial without blame.
lines.4: Walk the middle reporting openly—increase through transparency.
lines.5: Sincerity in the great increases gifts—heaven’s kindness flows.
lines.6: None to aid—perhaps struck from outside; resolve inner aim despite neglect.

43.judgement: Break-through: lake risen to heaven—declare truth resolutely at court. Danger attends, yet concealment harms worse.
43.image: Dispense benefits downward; rest not on brittle virtue.

lines.1: Vigor in the feet; halt when advance threatens whole body.
lines.2: Alarm, yet arms at night without panic—ready sincerity.
lines.3: Vigor in cheekbones brings misfortune; the great person decides alone.
lines.4: Walking alone against rain yet clear-hearted—no blame.
lines.5: Amid dry skin walk carefully—decision near bone, not show.
lines.6: No cry; misfortune at end—unheard truth collapses the breakthrough.

44.judgement: Coming to meet: heaven with wind—powerful encounter tests boundaries. Undisciplined attraction destabilizes.
44.image: Issue commands that reach the quarters without losing center.

lines.1: Drag wagon with brake—hold back premature joining.
lines.2: Fish in tank—contain influence without spill.
lines.3: Skin without flesh walking—superficial entanglement; peril.
lines.4: Fish in bundle without leak—carebound union contains desire.
lines.5: Melon wrapped with willow leaves—hidden beauty finds right descent.
lines.6: Horn lost, humbling—overextension loses edge; accept limits.

45.judgement: Gathering together: lake above earth—renew tools for what cannot be foreseen. Shared purpose concentrates virtue.
45.image: Heaven responds to sincere assembly; nurture good faith at the temple.

lines.1: With trust, gathering completes without forced call.
lines.2: Spontaneous gathering—sincerity draws without artifice.
lines.3: Gathering with lament; advance furthers when hearts openly grieve together.
lines.4: Great gathering without fault—broad alignment.
lines.5: Gathering position; regret vanishes when leader keeps to law.
lines.6: Sighing, yet no fault—honest weariness in service still gathers.

46.judgement: Pushing upward: wood within earth—stack small merits toward the great. Inexhaustible teaching lifts all.
46.image: Devoted character heaps little into high achievement gently.

lines.1: True confidence like offering to the spirit—small ascent accepted.
lines.2: If sincere, small offerings suffice—grateful ascent.
lines.3: Ascending through an empty city—trust opens gates.
lines.4: The king offers mount Chi sacrifice—public ascent with reverence.
lines.5: Correctness in ascending stairs—measured promotion.
lines.6: Ascending into darkness—overzealous climb blinds; desist at unknown depths.

47.judgement: Oppression: lake without water—will stake life on the vow when inner aim is pure.
47.image: Exhaustion tests whether purpose transcends comfort.

lines.1: Sitting under bare tree, wandering in obscure valley—exhaustion without losing years.
lines.2: Oppressed with food and drink; favorable for great person’s ordeal—accept sustenance in trial.
lines.3: Oppressed on stone, thorns—come home not seeing wife—reckless pressing worsens plight.
lines.4: Slowly coming, riding veiled in golden chariot—shame but arrival eventual.
lines.5: Nose and feet cut—gradual oppression; gentle words finally bring alliance.
lines.6: Oppressed in golden bridle—lasting lesson when exhaustion completes.

48.judgement: The well: city changes, well does not—source remains for the people. Encourage mutual drawing and temper words.
48.image: Wood floating on water: draw from common depth, serve common labor.

lines.1: Muddy well unused—clean the mouth of the source.
lines.2: Minnows in shallow well—small benefit until depth is restored.
lines.3: Well cleared but unused—sad waste; awaken collective use.
lines.4: The well is being lined—repair the vessel that holds depth.
lines.5: The cold spring feeds—constantly drink of the inexhaustible.
lines.6: Do not cover the well—openness to the people completes the blessing.

49.judgement: Revolution: fire in lake—molten time. When inner truth matures, outer forms may change without betrayal.
49.image: Set calendars and seasons—harmonize innovation with natural rhythm.

lines.1: Yellow ox-hide wrapping—protect nascent change with patience.
lines.2: On your day, you may revolutionize—timing sanctioned from within.
lines.3: Advance thrice, revolt thrice—exhaustion before breakthrough.
lines.4: Regret vanishes with mandate found: revolution gains trust.
lines.5: Great person changes like a tiger—auguries clarify without shout.
lines.6: The wise person changes like a panther; the small person alters face—depth versus surface.

50.judgement: The cauldron: refining essence in sacred vessel. Supreme good fortune when offerings transform self and society.
50.image: Fire over wood: consolidate fate by aligning structure with the real.

lines.1: Overturn the cauldron for new footing—clean foundations.
lines.2: Cauldron with contents—enemy resentment dissolves through nurture.
lines.3: Cauldron’s ears change—hard to move until you accept friction.
lines.4: Cauldron’s legs break—spill due to overloaded pride; mend humility.
lines.5: Cauldron with rings—wise person through refinement gains scope.
lines.6: Jade ring on top—great good fortune when refinement completes without boasting.

51.judgement: Shock: thunder repeated—alarm that sets life in order. Arousing clarity without habitual panic refines the nervous system.
51.image: Repeated thunder: use fear as a mirror; examine motives when the ground shakes.

lines.1: Shock spreads—nervous laughter and jitters; blameless if the heart steadies quickly.
lines.2: Shock arrives at treasure hill—loss and gain in one wave; seize the lesson.
lines.3: Shock stirs forward into mud—reckless reactivity mires purpose.
lines.4: Shock brings release in fetters—constraints break when truth electrifies.
lines.5: Shock repeatedly tracing peril—stay inwardly centered through successive jolts.
lines.6: Shock shrinks vision and hearing—overload narrows senses; withdraw to recover ground.

52.judgement: Keeping still: mountain doubled—thought stops at the spine’s gate. Stillness is active containment, not numbness.
52.image: Mountains side by side: do not let mind stray past the body’s here-and-now frontier.

lines.1: Still the feet—halt the chase at the base.
lines.2: Still the calves—legs obey before opinions wander.
lines.3: Still the hips—risk stiff fixation if lower will blocks heart.
lines.4: Still the trunk—hold center while limbs soften.
lines.5: Still the jaws—words discipline the gateway of intent.
lines.6: Noble stillness—complete cessation bears auspicious fruition.

53.judgement: Development: tree on mountain—gradual growth like a maiden’s marriage. Advance by degrees through propriety.
53.image: Dignity and virtue improve customs when growth is paced like rings in wood.

lines.1: Young geese on the shore—beginning ties; slight shame, no blame.
lines.2: Geese on rock: drink and eat in ease—simple nourishment in courtship of the goal.
lines.3: Geese on plateau—one advance, one retreat; order love of progress.
lines.4: Geese in trees—awkward perch yet finds branch; unusual placement still works.
lines.5: Geese on the summit—late union after patience; three years until fertile joy.
lines.6: Geese feathers in the sky—sublime uselessness crowns the gradual path—sign of completion.

54.judgement: Marrying maiden: thunder over lake—union undertaken rashly misaligns roles. Prefer clarity of place to desperate coupling.
54.image: Understand transience in light of the eternal end—marry action to meaning, not to mood alone.

lines.1: Sister’s marriage with legs as junior—humble station must accept honest limits.
lines.2: One-eyed yet able to see—partial sight suffices in constrained union.
lines.3: Youthful maiden waits—better delay than a hasty couch.
lines.4: Missed timing for maiden’s years—ripe window passes; adjust expectation without despair.
lines.5: Emperor’s younger sister—honored marriage through reduced pomp and true intent.
lines.6: Empty basket, no sheep blood—outer ritual without inner gift fails.

55.judgement: Abundance: thunder and lightning—fullness at noon. Celebrate peak brightness while foreseeing decline.
55.image: Decide disputes with fair thunder—justice in abundance tempers excess joy.

lines.1: When matched, abundance appears—partnership magnifies presence.
lines.2: Profuse obscuring small stars—great light may hide lesser truths—discriminate.
lines.3: Abundant underarm leaves downpour—store leaks if you ignore weak points.
lines.4: Breaking line of sight—abundance meets obstacle; thin the curtain honestly.
lines.5: Bringing brilliance—pairing lines of power shares the high noon.
lines.6: House filled, conceal the family—guard intimacy at peak; exposure invites envy.

56.judgement: The wanderer: fire on mountain—small success for the stranger. Travel light, courtesy, and clear penalties.
56.image: In alien hills clarity and caution in judgement protect the road.

lines.1: Petty meanness of the wanderer—watch base habits in exile.
lines.2: Wanderer reaches inn with goods—right modest luggage wins shelter.
lines.3: Burning the inn, loses servant—harshness costs help on the journey.
lines.4: Wanderer finds shelter, gains axe-heart—tools of survival through sincerity.
lines.5: Pheasant shot, one arrow—one clean aim wins esteem on the road.
lines.6: Bird burns nest—the wanderer first laughs, then loses ox—reckless levity topples shelter.

57.judgement: The gentle: winds following—success through small penetrations. Influence spreads like steady breath.
57.image: Penetration issues commands; undertakings ripple when rooted in repeated sincerity.

lines.1: Advance and retreat of the warlike—flexible advance tests resolve.
lines.2: Worship beneath the bed—humility reaches what thrones overlook.
lines.3: Repeated penetration exhausting—over-explaining weakens the invisible.
lines.4: Gain triple return by night—quiet persistence multiplies small wins.
lines.5: Sincerity penetrating to gold—truth reaches value; regret dissolves.
lines.6: Penetrating under bed—loss of gold and arrow—excessive subtlety loses substance.

58.judgement: The joyous: lakes in touch—shared discussion and practice. Joy succeeds when rooted in learning.
58.image: Join friends in earnest dialogue; gladness matures through mutual correction.

lines.1: Harmonious joy—open beginning without factions.
lines.2: Sincere joy—correct confidence in company.
lines.3: Coming joy—seeking delight in extremes dissolves discipline.
lines.4: Deliberating joy—measure pleasure against outcomes.
lines.5: Trust in the great person—shared joy stabilizes danger.
lines.6: Forced joy—surface cheer misleads; strip seduction.

59.judgement: Dispersion: wind over water—gathering of hearts through releasing ice. King approaches temple; crossing great water with perseverance melts blocks.
59.image: Sacrifice to the Lord and raise temples—renew the sacred weave after scattering.

lines.1: Help comes with strong horses—assist the rescue when dispersion begins.
lines.2: Dispersion runs to base—hurry to secure foundations before drift widens.
lines.3: Dispersing the self—ego dissolves toward the greater body—no blame.
lines.4: Dispersion leaves the throng—noble separation for clarity.
lines.5: Sweat of great dispersion—the king survives the great; radiance leaves bog.
lines.6: Blood departs, fear leaves—final dispersal of injury; keep far from harm’s trail.

60.judgement: Limitation: water over lake—number and measure. Success through bounds galling only if clung to past usefulness.
60.image: Make seasonal limits like knots on a cord—virtue measurable becomes teachable.

lines.1: Staying unsullied in limit—early restraint preserves purity.
lines.2: Limit leaving laments—acceptable strain when aiming at center.
lines.3: Limit without discipline—squandering invites shame.
lines.4: Peaceful limit—natural measure fits effortlessly.
lines.5: Sweet limit—good fortune toward humaneness.
lines.6: Pitiless limit—harsh measure misfortune; pit opens under rigidity.

61.judgement: Inner truth: wind over lake—pigs and fishes reached. Sincerity crosses inner and outer like wind over still water.
61.image: Deliberate justice delays executions when mercy and truth still speak.

lines.1: Preparedness brings readiness—harmonize motives before crossing.
lines.2: Calling crane in shade—child answers; hidden sincerity finds echo.
lines.3: Drum then stop, wail then sing—emotional inconsistency shakes trust.
lines.4: Horse team disappears—yield partners when fate uncouples teams.
lines.5: Sincerity binds like bonding captives—unites even unlikely allies.
lines.6: Rooster ascends sky—boastful truth fails when crow outruns deed.

62.judgement: Preponderance of the small: thunder on mountain—bird’s flight stays low. Small matters succeed when humility keeps height modest.
62.image: Give preponderance to reverence in conduct; avoid great actions while excess is small.

lines.1: Flying bird brings misfortune—low path safer than arrogant ascent.
lines.2: Passed ancestor, meets mother—honor lineage; not reaching king fits present limit.
lines.3: Do not guard against overshoot if warned—humility accepts correction.
lines.4: No fault meeting without warning—flexible caution needs no omen.
lines.5: Dense clouds, no rain at the west—near harvest waits; self-reference can block blessing.
lines.6: Passing overhead without meeting—the bird flies too high—name lost; misfortune of going far.

63.judgement: After completion: water over fire—order achieved yet entropy whispers. Success in small things; vigilance at the end.
63.image: Prepare for reversal in advance—mend bridges while sun still shines.

lines.1: Drag wheels, brake soaked—early friction prevents slide after success.
lines.2: Woman loses veil—do not chase; seven days returns what is yours.
lines.3: Long campaign in wasteland—protracted success exhausts; import youthful aid.
lines.4: Fine clothes turn ragged—decay begins in comfort; stay alert.
lines.5: Eastern neighbor slaughters ox—not as great hearts of sincerity as simple offerings.
lines.6: Head soaked—caution lost at top; disorder follows completion if pride swims.

64.judgement: Before completion: fire over water—almost across. The fox wets its tail when haste returns at the threshold.
64.image: Discriminate positions carefully; finishing requires separating what mixtures blur.

lines.1: Splashing tail—reckless start strays before firm footing.
lines.2: Brake wheels—rectify line under stall.
lines.3: Before completion brings misfortune yet favors crossing if effort matches danger.
lines.4: Persevering; danger from unsubdued tools—steady will with humble gear.
lines.5: Sincere radiance—small profit, great determination for the ford.
lines.6: Drinking wine— careless joy at the brink—soaks the leader—shame of incompletion.
